content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(i) WARN — privacy policy claims "We do not collect, process, or store your location data" but the app uses CoreLocation and stores GPS routes (App/RunSessionManager.swift:1,15 appends CLLocation to `route`; description.txt says "maps every run with GPS").
Pierre: Apple checks the privacy policy against actual data practices, and a direct contradiction like this is a classic 5.1.1 rejection trigger. The code clearly collects and retains location data via CLLocationManager while the fetched policy at https://runtracker.example/privacy flatly denies any location processing. Update the policy to accurately describe on-device/iCloud storage of GPS route data before submission.
